free_text: Measurement of total cross section of nuclei produced
by 20Ne bombing at 9Be target
The Heavy Ion Research Facility of
Lanzhou (HIRFL) followed by Radiactive Ion Beam Line
in Lanzhou (RIBLL)
The thickness of Be target was 3 mm.
17 m flight path
To measure TOF of secondary beam
To determine delta-E of secondary beam
Fragmentation of the 20Ne primary beam accelerated to
80 MeV/u by Be target (3 mm thick).
By compiler: The incident energy of the secondary
beam is not given in the article. The incident energy
(30 MeV/u) was taken from the article reporting
production of secondary beams by 20Ne (80 MeV/u) + Be
by the same author: Li Jia-Xing et al., High Energy
Phys. Nucl. Phys. 29(2005)28.
Statistical uncertainty
Figure 4
